recommendations.rationale: Tencent is holding a range with strong volume, but remains below its 60-day average; wait for confirmation before adding risk.
evidence: Latest close 552.0 HKD is above MA20 528.25 but below MA60 579.725
Regime flags show range and volume-expansion with volume ratio 1.5985
60-day range position is mid-low at 0.3817 after a mild -0.271% daily move
risks: High-volume range action may be distribution rather than accumulation
Failure to reclaim the 60-day average could keep the stock capped
recommendations.invalidation: Turn constructive only if price reclaims and holds above the 60-day average; turn avoid if it breaks below the recent low near 548 on continued heavy volume.

recommendations.rationale: Alibaba remains in a downtrend near the lower end of its 60-day range, so fresh exposure should wait.
evidence: Latest close 133.2 HKD is below MA20 144.11 and MA60 151.77
risks: Oversold positioning can produce sharp counter-trend rebounds
Low relative volume may make the signal less decisive
recommendations.invalidation: Reconsider if Alibaba closes back above MA20 with improving volume and stops making lower lows.

recommendations.rationale: Xiaomi is the weakest stock in the watchlist today and remains below both key moving averages.
evidence: Latest close 33.34 HKD is below MA20 34.711 and MA60 36.9157
Daily move of -0.833% makes it the largest laggard in the snapshot
Regime flag is downtrend with low 60-day range position 0.1547
risks: A broad tech rebound could lift Xiaomi despite weak current trend
Volume ratio 0.8165 is not capitulation-level, so downside pressure may persist slowly
recommendations.invalidation: Reconsider if price regains MA20 and the 60-day range position improves above 0.30 with stronger relative volume.

recommendations.rationale: The broad Hong Kong market ETF is slightly weak and below trend, but its diversified exposure makes it a watch rather than an outright avoid.
evidence: Latest close 26.1 HKD is below MA20 26.567 and MA60 26.579
60-day range position is low-mid at 0.2409 with muted volume ratio 0.5359
risks: Weak market breadth can continue pulling the ETF lower
Low volume may mean there is not yet a strong reversal signal
recommendations.invalidation: Become more constructive only if price closes back above both MA20 and MA60; become avoid if it breaks below 26.0 with expanding volume.

recommendations.rationale: Hang Seng Tech exposure remains in a downtrend below both moving averages, so new buys need patience.
evidence: Latest close 4.936 HKD is below MA20 5.0557 and MA60 5.3645
60-day range position is low at 0.2263 with volume ratio 0.4167
risks: Tech ETFs can rebound quickly if policy or liquidity sentiment improves
Low volume makes the current decline less forceful but also lacks accumulation evidence
recommendations.invalidation: Reconsider if 3033.HK reclaims MA20 and relative volume expands above its 20-day average.

recommendations.rationale: 3067.HK is the relative leader today only because it fell less, while its trend structure remains weak.
evidence: Latest close 10.59 HKD is below MA20 10.833 and MA60 11.4913
It led the snapshot with only -0.094% daily move, but range position remains low at 0.2237
risks: Relative resilience may be early stabilization rather than weakness
Thin turnover compared with other ETFs can make signals noisier
recommendations.invalidation: Reconsider if 3067.HK closes above MA20 with range position improving above 0.35 and no new lower low.
